title: EMOM Clock
description: 12-minute EMOM with commando push-ups, goblet squats and flutter kicks for endurance

exercises.name: Joint rotations
exercises.instructions: Neck, shoulders, wrists, hips, ankles - slow and controlled

exercises.name: Butt kicks
exercises.instructions: Run in place, heels to glutes

exercises.name: Deep squat hold
exercises.instructions: Hold a deep squat, back straight, elbows against the knees

exercises.name: Brisk march in place
exercises.instructions: Walk quickly in place with arm swings

exercises.name: Commando push-ups
exercises.instructions: Alternate between forearm plank and high plank

exercises.name: Goblet squat (no weight)
exercises.instructions: Hands in front of the chest, sit deep

exercises.name: Flutter kicks
exercises.instructions: Back on the floor, legs extended, quick flutters

exercises.name: Hamstring stretch
exercises.instructions: Leg extended forward, lean torso forward

exercises.name: Standing quad stretch
exercises.instructions: Grab your foot behind you, knee toward the floor

exercises.name: World's greatest stretch
exercises.instructions: Lunge + torso rotation + arm to the sky

exercises.name: Child's pose
exercises.instructions: Kneeling, arms extended forward, forehead on the floor, breathe deeply
